pi_items.verified_value: Only 2 supplementary leave requests added (Rachel Perry and Doris Cole)
pi_items.source: setup_data.py lines 20-23: 'This script ONLY adds what the demo data doesn't include: 1. A Paid Time Off allocation for Rachel Perry (so she can submit a PTO leave request) 2. A pending leave request for Rachel Perry (needed for Task 7: approve_leave_request) 3. A pending leave request for Doris Cole (needed for Task 8: refuse_leave_request)'

task.json line 6: "difficulty": "medium". Task involves: login, navigation to Expenses app, creating an expense with specific field values, creating and submitting an expense report. This represents moderate complexity - more involved than simple navigation but less complex than multi-step workflows.

privileged_info_summary: The create_expense_report task uses Odoo 17 Community Edition running on localhost:8069 with PostgreSQL 15 backend. The environment loads official Odoo demo data containing 20 employees (including Ernest Reed), 7 departments, and required HR modules (hr, hr_holidays, hr_expense, hr_recruitment). Admin credentials are admin/admin. The task requires creating an expense with description 'Client Meeting - Q4 Strategy', amount 85.00, assigned to employee Ernest Reed, then creating and submitting an expense report. Ernest Reed is confirmed as one of the official demo employees in the bundled Odoo 17 HR demo data (hr_demo.xml). The environment uses desktop automation (Firefox, xdotool, scrot) for browser-based interaction.
